title: Le avventure di Pinocchio
writer: Carlo Collodi, Gian Carlo Fusco, Gianetto Guardone
actors: Alessandro Tommei, Mariella Lotti, Vittorio Gassman
plot: The most faithful adaptation of Carlo Collodi's renowned fairy tale. After the spirit of Pinocchio miraculously comes to life under Geppetto's hand plane, the puppet frees himself from the hands of his author and father, starting ...
